name: Vector Search (embeddings, ANN, hybrid retrieval)
description: 向量检索:嵌入、近似最近邻与混合检索

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['vector_search','embedding','ann','hybrid_search','vector_db'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(vector search|ann index|hnsw|ivf|pgvector|qdrant|milvus|faiss|embedding model|hybrid search|dense retrieval|sparse retrieval|re.?rank)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
